description: Create an Ultimatum Game experiment in PsychoPy Builder where a proposer offers a split of $10 and the participant (Responder) accepts or rejects it. Generate a conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ug_conditions.csv containing 'offer' and 'keep' columns with five rows where the values sum to 10. Build the experiment at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/ultimatum_game.psyexp featuring an instruction routine, a trial routine within a loop linked to the conditions file, and a feedback routine. The trial routine must display the offer and keep values, capture 'y' (accept) or 'n' (reject) responses, and calculate earnings (the offer amount for 'y', 0 for 'n') and a feedback message for display in the feedback routine.
